name: Special Week
cardText:
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower.
[feed][cost01]: Race this follower.
[fanfare] Look at the top card of your deck. If it's an Umamusume card, you may reveal it and add it to your hand.

name: Special Week (Evolved)
